launcher.command.description: Filter, jump to, rename or reset Niri workspaces
launcher.renamePrompt.name: Type a new name for Workspace {idx}
launcher.renamePrompt.description: Press Enter to apply. Type {sigil}{sigil} to reset.
launcher.resetPrompt.name: Reset name of {target}
launcher.resetPrompt.description: Clears the custom name — press Enter to apply
launcher.applyRename.name: Set name: {name}
launcher.applyRename.unchangedDescriptio: Name is already set — press Enter to close
launcher.noMatches.name: No workspaces match "{filter}"
launcher.noMatches.description: Try a different filter or clear it
launcher.noHighlighted.name: No workspace to edit
launcher.noHighlighted.description: Highlight a workspace in the list, or open the launcher on Niri
launcher.notNiri.name: Not running on Niri
launcher.notNiri.description: This plugin only works on the Niri compositor
